title: 4. NG  points 1010.19 ( Shui Tong )  and   1010.20 ( Shui Jin ):
text:
The combination of these points has a very important effect on the function of two
very important organs; the kidneys and the lungs.
Since the proper functioning of each of these two organs is necessary for each other.
Therefore, they will be useful for most patients.
Given that one of the most common causes of shortness of breath and cough,
especially dry cough, is a disorder of the kidney-lung axis, the above points are very
important.
As a result, by strengthening the kidneys and adrenals, they increase energy, strengthen
the immune system, and strengthen the lungs and moisturize them.
 Kidney and lung problems
 Strengthening the lungs - kidney failure
 Inflammatory and allergic diseases of the lungs, such as asthma and ...
 Cough - Dyspnea
 Nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain
 Chest and rib wall pain when breathing
 Pain, fatigue and general weakness of the body
 The first point is 0.5 Cun below the outer corner of the lip - the second point is
0.5 Cun from the first point with a 45-degree angle downwards and inwards
((Two sided simultaneously))
19 | P a g e
20 | P a g e
